iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 20 Hour 05: % (up). latest_news.headline: Iran MPs propose tolls/taxes on all shipping through Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Iranian lawmakers propose legislation to impose tolls and taxes on ships passing through Strait of Hormuz — new economic blockade mechanism alongside physical interdiction.

latest_news.headline: Trump-Netanyahu split on South Pars: 'I told him don't do that'
latest_news.text: Trump confirms he neither agreed with nor approved Israel's South Pars strike. 'We get along great. It's coordinated, but on occasion he'll do something.' Daylight between the two leaders visible for first time.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 20 Hour 05: % (stable). Ground invasion continues. 1,000+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Litani operations ongoing. No ceasefire signals. Updated 2026-03-20T05:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 7% (stable). Day 20 Hour 05: % (stable). 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace since war began. NATO Patriot at Incirlik active. Caspian Sea strikes bring war to Turkey's geographic neighborhood. Coupling from Iran keeps elevated. Updated 2026-03-20T05:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 8% (stable). Day 20 Hour 05: % (stable). No new developments. Border tension contained. Updated 2026-03-20T05:00:00Z

Israel destroying assets in Russia's maritime backyard. Russia supplies arms to Iran but no direct intervention. Oil price boost to Russian revenue. Updated 2026-03-20T05:00:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 41% (stable). Day 20 Hour 05: % (stable). Peace talks formally paused due to Iran war. Oil price surge reduces Russia's economic pressure to negotiate. Kremlin confirms 'situational pause.' Zelensky expects weekend discussions but momentum lost. Updated 2026-03-20T05:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: US-Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused due to Iran war
latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 38% (stable). Day 20 Hour 05: % (stable). 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP 3-day truce also active. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected. Updated 2026-03-20T05:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

top_signals: Israel strikes Iranian Navy in Caspian Sea for first time — geographic expansion to Russia's maritime neighborhood
Brent crude spiked to $119/barrel intraday, settled at $108.65 — up 60% since war began (Feb 28)
Gabbard testimony: IC assessed Iran's nuclear program 'obliterated' in 2025, no enrichment resumed — contradicts war justification
Trump-Netanyahu rift on South Pars: Trump 'told him don't do that' but Israel launches fresh strikes
Netanyahu claims war 'ending faster than people think' and Iran 'decimated' — yet operations expanding
Iran asks Germany to clarify Ramstein airbase role in war — potential European involvement question
Saudi FM warns patience 'not unlimited' — military options on table if Iran continues Gulf strikes
Israel strikes 200+ targets in northern Iran including Bandar Anzali port — widest operational scope yet
Pentagon seeks $200B+ supplemental war funding — open-ended commitment
QatarEnergy: 17% global LNG capacity cut for up to 5 years, force majeure continues

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 20 Hour 05. Key developments: (1) Caspian Sea strikes — massive geographic expansion. (2) Gabbard testimony undercuts 'imminent threat' justification. (3) Trump-Netanyahu coordination gaps visible. (4) Netanyahu claims war ending soon but operations expanding. (5) Brent hit $119 intraday. (6) Saudi Arabia escalates rhetoric to military options. (7) Eid ceasefire holding in Pakistan-Afghanistan. No new conflict zones. No de-escalation signals in active theaters.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Iranian Navy in Caspian Sea for first time — destroys missile boats, corvette at Bandar Anzali
latest_news.text: IAF strikes hit 200+ targets in northern Iran including Iranian Navy vessels in the Caspian Sea — first time war extends to Caspian. 4 missile boats, 1 corvette, naval infrastructure at Bandar Anzali destroyed. Caspian bordered by Russia, Azerbaijan, Kazakhstan, Turkmenistan — unprecedented geographic expansion.

latest_news.headline: Brent crude spikes to $119/barrel intraday before settling at $108.65 — oil up 60% since war began
latest_news.text: Brent briefly touched $119.13 intraday (+11%) before retreating to $108.65 settlement. WTI hit $101 briefly, settled at $96.14. Crude up ~60% since Feb 28 war start. Energy crisis deepening globally.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard testified Iran's nuclear program 'obliterated' in 2025, no enrichment resumed — contradicts Trump's war justification
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard's written testimony says IC assessed Iran's nuclear program was 'obliterated' in June 2025 strikes, no efforts to rebuild enrichment. She omitted this from oral testimony. Contradicts Trump's claim Iran was close to nuclear bomb. IAEA had 'no evidence of Iran building nuclear bomb.'

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu says war ending 'faster than people think', Israel 'winning' — but Israel launches fresh strikes after Trump energy halt order
latest_news.text: Netanyahu press conference: 'This war ending a lot faster than people think.' Says Iran 'decimated' — can no longer enrich uranium or build ballistic missiles. But Israel launched fresh attack waves after Trump told it not to repeat energy strikes. Visible US-Israel coordination gaps.

latest_news.headline: Iran expels Germany ambassador query over Ramstein airbase role; Saudi FM warns patience 'not unlimited'
latest_news.text: Iran asks Germany to clarify Ramstein airbase role in war. Saudi FM Prince Faisal bin Farhan says Gulf patience 'not unlimited' — military options on table if Iran continues strikes. Riyadh says 'little trust remaining in Iran completely shattered.'

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 05:00 UTC) — Deep scan: (1) Israel strikes Iranian Navy in Caspian Sea — first time war extends to Caspian, bordered by Russia. 4 missile boats + corvette destroyed at Bandar Anzali. (2) Brent crude spiked to $119/barrel before settling at $108.65. Oil up 60% since war began. (3) Gabbard Senate/House testimony: IC says Iran's nuclear program 'obliterated' in 2025, no enrichment resumed — directly contradicts Trump's 'imminent threat' justification for war. (4) Trump-Netanyahu public rift on South Pars. Israel launches fresh strikes after Trump said 'told him don't do that.' (5) Netanyahu says war 'ending faster than people think' — but IAF hits 200+ targets in widest operational scope yet. (6) Saudi FM warns patience 'not unlimited,' military options on table. (7) Iran asks Germany to clarify Ramstein airbase role. (8) US approves $16bn arms to UAE/Kuwait. (9) Pakistan-Afghanistan: Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23. (10) Russia-Ukraine: peace talks paused, oil revenue boost reduces pressure on Russia. No new conflict zones. Global probability remains CRITICAL at 45%.
